debug_info.goal:
u : Scalar52
h : u ≠ ZERO
⊢ ∃ m, u.as_montgomery = ok m ∧ Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] ∧ m ≠ ZERO

failed_attempts:
have ⟨m, h_as, h_mod⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, h_as, h_mod, fun hm => ?_⟩
  have h_u_mod : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    apply cancelR
    rw [Nat.zero_mul]
    rw [hm, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at h_mod
    exact h_mod.symm
  have h_u_nat : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 := (Nat.ModEq.eq_zero_iff_lt (Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u)).mpr h_u_mod
  exact h (Scalar52_as_Nat_inj.mp (h_u_nat.trans Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO.symm))

obtain ⟨m, h_m, h_spec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  use m, h_m, h_spec
  intro hm; subst hm
  have h_mod : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] :=
    cancelR (by simpa [Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO, Nat.zero_mul] using h_spec.symm)
  have h_eq : Scalar52_as_Nat u = Scalar52_as_Nat ZERO :=
    Nat.ModEq.eq_of_lt_of_lt h_mod (Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u) (Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L ZERO)
  exact h (Scalar52_as_Nat_inj h_eq)

rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, h_m, h_spec⟩
  refine ⟨m, h_m, h_spec, ?_⟩
  intro hm
  have h_u_mod : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    apply cancelR (b := 0)
    simpa [hm, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] using h_spec.symm
  have h_u_nat : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 :=
    Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt (Nat.ModEq.modeq_zero_iff_dvd.mp h_u_mod) (Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u)
  exact h (Scalar52_as_Nat_inj (h_u_nat.trans Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO.symm))
